'''rafaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kaddish|kaddish]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-f-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kaddish|kaddish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rafaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræfæyæth|ræfæyæth]] || [[word:ræfæyæj|ræfæyæj]] || [[word:ræfæyæsh|ræfæyæsh]] || [[word:ræfæyæ|ræfæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rafafayath|rafafayath]] || [[word:rafafayaj|rafafayaj]] || [[word:rafafayash|rafafayash]] || [[word:rafafaya|rafafaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rafayath|rafayath]] || [[word:rafayaj|rafayaj]] || [[word:rafayash|rafayash]] || [[word:rafaya|rafaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rafafyath|rafafyath]] || [[word:rafafyaj|rafafyaj]] || [[word:rafafyash|rafafyash]] || [[word:rafafyaf|rafafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rafayatha|rafayatha]] || [[word:rafayaja|rafayaja]] || [[word:rafayasha|rafayasha]] || [[word:rafayaka|rafayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rafayath|rafayath]] || [[word:rafayaj|rafayaj]] || [[word:rafayash|rafayash]] || [[word:rafaya|rafaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rafayathal|rafayathal]] || [[word:rafayajal|rafayajal]] || [[word:rafayashal|rafayashal]] || [[word:rafayakal|rafayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rafayathatha|rafayathatha]] || [[word:rafayajaja|rafayajaja]] || [[word:rafayashasha|rafayashasha]] || [[word:rafayaka|rafayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rafayathan|rafayathan]] || [[word:rafayajan|rafayajan]] || [[word:rafayashan|rafayashan]] || [[word:rafayakan|rafayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rafayathaoro|rafayathaoro]] || [[word:rafayajaoro|rafayajaoro]] || [[word:rafayashaoro|rafayashaoro]] || [[word:rafayakaoro|rafayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
